coverage_note: Third expansion batch: EU/EEA national implementing laws, APAC special jurisdictions, Middle East, and Africa privacy laws.

records.title: Federal Data Protection Act
records.official_citation: Bundesdatenschutzgesetz
records.summary: Germany's federal data protection law supplementing the GDPR, with rules on public-sector processing, employee data, special categories, scoring, video surveillance, and supervisory authorities.
key_obligations: Check BDSG rules in addition to GDPR for German processing.
Assess employee-data and special-category processing under German supplements.
Track German DPO and supervisory-authority requirements.

records.title: French Data Protection Act
records.official_citation: Loi n° 78-17 du 6 janvier 1978 relative à l'informatique, aux fichiers et aux libertés
records.summary: France's national data protection act, adapted to GDPR, with national provisions on CNIL powers, health data, children, sensitive processing, and enforcement.
key_obligations: Apply French national supplements alongside GDPR.
Check CNIL rules and authorisations for sensitive or health processing.
Track French-specific age and rights requirements.

records.title: Organic Law on Data Protection and Guarantee of Digital Rights
records.official_citation: Ley Orgánica 3/2018
records.summary: Spain's GDPR adaptation law with national processing bases, digital rights, employee privacy, whistleblowing, and AEPD enforcement provisions.
key_obligations: Apply Spanish digital-rights and employee-monitoring rules.
Check Spanish age and consent rules for minors.
Use AEPD criteria for national enforcement risk.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Code
records.authority: Garante per la protezione dei dati personali
records.official_citation: Codice in materia di protezione dei dati personali
records.summary: Italy's personal data protection code as amended for GDPR, with national rules and Garante powers across sensitive, employment, telecom, and marketing contexts.
key_obligations: Apply Italian national supplements and Garante measures.
Check marketing, employment, and health-data rules.
Maintain evidence aligned with Garante expectations.

records.title: Dutch GDPR Implementation Act
records.official_citation: Uitvoeringswet Algemene verordening gegevensbescherming
records.summary: Dutch GDPR implementation act containing national provisions and exemptions for applying GDPR in the Netherlands.
key_obligations: Check Dutch age, sensitive-data, and exemption provisions.
Use AP guidance for Dutch enforcement expectations.
Document reliance on national derogations.

records.title: Data Protection Act 2018
records.authority: Irish Statute Book / Data Protection Commission
records.official_citation: Data Protection Act 2018
records.summary: Ireland's data protection act implementing GDPR and the Law Enforcement Directive and establishing DPC powers.
key_obligations: Apply Irish GDPR supplements and DPC procedural rules.
Check Irish children's consent and public-interest provisions.
Handle law-enforcement processing under Part 5 where relevant.

records.title: Austrian Data Protection Act
records.official_citation: Datenschutzgesetz
records.summary: Austrian data protection act supplementing GDPR and setting national rules and authority powers.
key_obligations: Check Austrian national exemptions and public-sector rules.
Use DSB guidance for local enforcement expectations.
Document national-law bases where relied on.

records.title: Belgian Data Protection Act
records.official_citation: Loi relative à la protection des personnes physiques à l'égard des traitements de données à caractère personnel
records.summary: Belgian national act implementing and supplementing GDPR and law-enforcement data protection rules.
key_obligations: Apply Belgian national derogations and age rules.
Assess sensitive and law-enforcement processing under Belgian law.
Track Belgian DPA enforcement expectations.

records.title: Danish Data Protection Act
records.official_citation: Act on supplementary provisions to the regulation on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data
records.summary: Danish act supplementing GDPR with national rules and derogations.
key_obligations: Check Danish national processing rules and exceptions.
Use Datatilsynet guidance for local implementation.
Assess employee and national identification data carefully.

records.title: Swedish Data Protection Act
records.official_citation: Act with supplementary provisions to the EU General Data Protection Regulation
records.summary: Swedish act containing supplementary provisions to GDPR, including public-sector and sensitive-data provisions.
key_obligations: Apply Swedish supplementary provisions with GDPR.
Check public-sector and national register contexts.
Use IMY guidance for enforcement risk.

records.title: Personal Data Act
records.official_citation: Personal Data Act
records.summary: Norway's act implementing GDPR in the EEA context with national supplements.
key_obligations: Apply Norwegian supplementary provisions to GDPR processing.
Check children's consent and sensitive-data contexts.
Track Datatilsynet guidance and enforcement.

records.title: Data Protection Act
records.official_citation: Data Protection Act 1050/2018
records.summary: Finnish national law supplementing GDPR and setting rules for national processing contexts and supervisory powers.
key_obligations: Apply Finnish supplements and age rules.
Assess public-sector and special-category provisions.
Document use of national derogations.

records.title: Portuguese GDPR Implementation Law
records.summary: Portugal's law implementing GDPR, with national provisions on children, employment, deceased persons, and supervisory authority rules.
key_obligations: Check Portuguese national provisions for children and employment.
Apply CNPD guidance and enforcement expectations.
Document national-law supplements.

records.title: Act on Processing of Personal Data
records.official_citation: Act No. 110/2019 Coll., on Processing of Personal Data
keywords: Czech Act on Processing of Personal Data
records.summary: Czech law adapting GDPR and law-enforcement data protection rules to national law.
key_obligations: Assess Czech national exemptions and public-sector rules.
Use UOOU guidance for local application.
Document national-law processing bases.

records.title: Polish Data Protection Act
records.official_citation: Act on the Protection of Personal Data
records.summary: Polish data protection act supplementing GDPR and establishing UODO powers and procedures.
key_obligations: Apply Polish national procedural and authority rules.
Track UODO guidance for enforcement expectations.
Maintain Polish-language and local evidence where required.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Act
records.authority: Preparatory Office of Personal Data Protection Commission
records.official_citation: Personal Data Protection Act
records.summary: Taiwan's personal data protection law governing collection, processing, use, international transfer restrictions, rights, and security.
key_obligations: Identify specific purpose and legal basis for collection/use.
Provide notices and rights mechanisms.
Assess cross-border restrictions and sector-specific controls.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Act
records.official_citation: Law No. 8/2005 Personal Data Protection Act
records.summary: Macao personal data protection law with principles, rights, sensitive-data rules, authorisation/notification mechanisms, and transfer controls.
key_obligations: Apply lawful basis, notice, and rights rules for Macao data.
Assess sensitive data and cross-border transfer requirements.
Track notification or authorisation obligations.

records.title: Personal Data Privacy Protection Law
records.authority: National Cyber Security Agency / National Cyber Governance and Assurance Affairs
records.official_citation: Law No. 13 of 2016 Concerning Personal Data Privacy Protection
records.summary: Qatar's personal data privacy law governing personal data processing, individual rights, safeguards, and competent-authority oversight.
key_obligations: Provide notices and respect individual privacy rights.
Protect personal data with organisational and technical precautions.
Assess sensitive data, electronic marketing, and transfer contexts.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Law
records.official_citation: Law No. 30 of 2018 Promulgating the Personal Data Protection Law
records.summary: Bahrain data protection law with controller duties, rights, transfer rules, sensitive processing, and authority oversight.
key_obligations: Identify processing basis and provide notices.
Support rights and objections.
Assess cross-border transfers and sensitive-data authorisations.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Law
records.authority: Ministry of Transport, Communications and Information Technology
records.official_citation: Personal Data Protection Law issued by Royal Decree No. 6/2022
records.summary: Oman's personal data protection law governing processing, rights, controller duties, sensitive personal data, and cross-border transfers.
key_obligations: Collect and process personal data under permitted bases and notices.
Handle sensitive data and rights requests carefully.
Assess transfer and security duties under implementing rules.

records.title: Protection of Privacy Law
records.official_citation: Protection of Privacy Law, 5741-1981
records.summary: Israel's privacy law governing databases, privacy rights, security, direct marketing, and regulatory oversight.
key_obligations: Assess database registration and security obligations.
Provide notices and rights mechanisms.
Track Privacy Protection Authority guidance and amendments.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Law
records.official_citation: Law No. 151 of 2020 Promulgating the Personal Data Protection Law
records.summary: Egypt's personal data protection law regulating electronic personal data processing, controller/processor duties, rights, transfers, and licensing concepts.
key_obligations: Identify consent or legal basis and provide notices.
Assess sensitive data and cross-border transfer controls.
Track executive regulations and licensing requirements.

records.title: Law No. 09-08 on Personal Data Protection
records.official_citation: Law No. 09-08 relating to the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data
records.summary: Morocco's personal data protection law with CNDP oversight, declarations/authorisations, rights, sensitive data, and transfer controls.
key_obligations: Assess declaration or authorisation obligations.
Provide notice and rights procedures.
Control sensitive data and transfers abroad.

records.title: Organic Law on the Protection of Personal Data
records.official_citation: Organic Law No. 2004-63 on the Protection of Personal Data
records.summary: Tunisia's personal data protection law with authority oversight, consent, authorisation, rights, and transfer controls.
key_obligations: Check authorisation and declaration requirements.
Provide notices and rights handling.
Assess sensitive data and cross-border transfers.

records.title: Data Protection Act, 2012
records.official_citation: Data Protection Act, 2012 (Act 843)
records.summary: Ghana's data protection act with principles, registration, data subject rights, security safeguards, and commission oversight.
key_obligations: Register with the Data Protection Commission where applicable.
Comply with data protection principles and rights.
Maintain security safeguards and processor controls.

records.title: Law Relating to the Protection of Personal Data and Privacy
records.official_citation: Law No. 058/2021 relating to the protection of personal data and privacy
records.summary: Rwanda's personal data and privacy law with controller/processor duties, rights, sensitive data, transfers, and registration concepts.
key_obligations: Provide notices and lawful processing basis.
Support rights and security safeguards.
Assess registration and cross-border transfer duties.

records.title: Data Protection Act 2017
records.official_citation: Data Protection Act 2017
records.summary: Mauritius data protection law aligned with GDPR-style principles, including lawful basis, rights, DPO, transfer, and breach obligations.
key_obligations: Identify lawful basis and controller/processor duties.
Support rights and breach notification.
Assess transfers and registration where applicable.

records.title: Data Protection and Privacy Act, 2019
records.official_citation: Data Protection and Privacy Act, 2019
keywords: Uganda Data Protection and Privacy Act
records.summary: Uganda data protection and privacy law with principles, rights, controller obligations, security, and office oversight.
key_obligations: Register or comply with PDPO requirements where applicable.
Provide notices and rights mechanisms.
Maintain security and accountability controls.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Act, 2022
records.official_citation: Personal Data Protection Act, 2022
records.summary: Tanzania's personal data protection law with commission oversight, registration, lawful processing, rights, sensitive data, and transfer controls.
key_obligations: Assess registration and lawful processing requirements.
Support data subject rights and notices.
Control sensitive data and cross-border transfers.
